case_title: BRIAN JIAN HAO KUANG VS. BOOKER T. CRAYTON

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY KUANG, BRIAN JIAN HAO AS TO DEFENDANT CRAYTON, BOOKER T. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-28-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-28-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KUANG, BRIAN JIAN HAO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CRAYTON, BOOKER T. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
